title: Entabeni: Nature meets luxury
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Nestled in the heart of...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Nestled in the heart of Knysna, Hudson Heights on the Entabeni Estate offers a unique urban farm lifestyle combining stunning natural beauty, modern amenities, and sustainable living. Hudson Heights offers farm serenity while being ideally located close to modern city conveniences.

Hudson Heights on EntabeniEntabeni provides a perfect blend of tranquil urban farm style living. Hudson Heights being the first phase of this development offers 28 prime-view freehold sites, with quick access to quality schools and world-class sporting facilities.

The development is located on Welbedacht Lane and is just 7 minutes from the Knysna CBD and only 45 minutes from George Airport.

A scenic, elevated living experienceWith a strong focus on creating a seamless flow throughout the estate, the design of Entabeni ensures that residents of Hudson Heights are constantly immersed in the breathtaking views that define this property.Strategically positioned homes take full advantage of the panoramic vista across the Knysna Heads and lagoon, the estuary and Outeniqua mountains.

A pet-friendly communityEntabeni is also a pet-friendly estate, where dogs and cats are welcome.

Security, infrastructure and technologyThe commitment to quality living extends to its security and infrastructure.

The estate is fenced, and all stands are fully serviced, including hi-speed internet. Access to this gated estate is controlled off Welbedacht Lane which is monitored by Allsound Security via CCTV cameras.

Pricing30% of the stands on this exclusive development are already sold and the remaining stands range in value from R1 450 000 to R2 500 000.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
